CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] FLAT: Regulatory Uncertainty Offsets Institutional Tailwinds; Price Action Awaited
tldr_points: US crypto legislation faces Senate hurdles despite committee progress, introducing regulatory uncertainty
Jito consumer expansion and Hyperliquid onchain perps signal institutional-grade infrastructure maturation
Technical levels undefined; await price confirmation at key moving averages before committing directional exposure
